creator: chifeng@gmail.com
text:
Hi, Wesley and Linimon
Thanks for your carefully! This software has some bug fix after
extman-0.2.4/extmail-1.0.4 first release.

1, To download it before 12:00 Mar 28,2008. have some bugs exists
2, To download it before 22:55 Mar 31,2008, The SQL file have error.
3, To download it before 1:00 April 1,2008, 2 bug fixed and this
script has problem(extman/tools/expireusers.pl )
4, To download it before 20:00 April 1,2088, it's have critical security hole.

So, The author re-rolled it and release this version again. it's too bad!!! :(

root reason URL:http://www.extmail.org/forum/thread-7260-1-1.html

regards
Chifeng.


On Thu, Apr 24, 2008 at 11:25 PM, Wesley Shields <wxs@atarininja.org> wrote:
> Would you be willing to provide a brief synopsis of why the tarball was
>  re-rolled?  I'm unable to find a copy of the old tarball to compare
>  against and would like to include this information in the commit
>  message.
>
>  -- WXS
>



-- 
regards.
chifeng
